messages.initial: How can I assist you today?
messages.error: I'm sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
messages.helperText: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for new line

suggestions.title: Try asking:
suggestions.subtitle: Click on any suggestion to get started

openIn.label: Open in
openIn.prompt: Explain the content of this page: {page}. Context: {url}. Explain when to use it, why to use it, best practices, and alternatives based on the documentation provided. It could be a page about components, tools, libraries, concepts, etc. Do not provide unnecessary information. ALWAYS based on the documentation provided.

explainButton.label: Explain this
explainButton.prompt: Explain the content of this page: {page}. Context: {url}. Explain when to use it, why to use it, best practices, and alternatives based on the documentation provided. It could be a page about components, tools, libraries, concepts, etc. Do not provide unnecessary information. ALWAYS based on the documentation provided.
